Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}Hey, do you have anyone to go around with tomorrow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}Oh, wait... Are you going out with someone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}But if you've got a girlfriend, don't think you can fool around just because you're on a trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}Girls get really mad when you do that, you know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}Really? Then are you trying to decide who you'll go after?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}I wish I had someone cool, so I wouldn't be as bored...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 613}Ugh, that's no fun... Way to kill the conversation there.[n]{f 1 1}
